name: Intralinks Virtual Data Room and Deal Management API
what_it_does: Intralinks virtual data room and deal management REST API for investment banks, law firms, debt capital markets, and corporate development teams to manage secure document sharing, due diligence, and syndicated lending workflows. Enables AI agents to manage deal workspace and VDR creation for M&A and debt capital markets workflow automation, handle document upload and secure sharing for due diligence document access automation, access debt deal and syndicated loan management for debt capital markets workflow automation, retrieve deal participant and investor access management for capital markets transaction automation, manage document analytics and access tracking for deal process management automation, handle Q&A and information request workflow for deal due diligence automation, access IntelliSign e-signature for deal document execution automation, retrieve deal pipeline and CRM for investment banking deal origination automation, manage regulatory filing documentation for deal compliance automation, and integrate Intralinks with deal management, CRM, and banking systems for end-to-end capital markets transaction management.
use_cases: Managing M&A deal rooms from investment banking automation agents
Distributing debt offering documents from syndicated lending agents
Tracking investor access from capital markets analytics agents
Processing deal Q&A from due diligence coordination agents
not_for: General enterprise file sharing (use SharePoint or Box)
Litigation document review (use Everlaw or Relativity)
Small business document sharing (use Dropbox Business)
best_when: An investment bank, law firm, or corporate development team wanting AI agents to automate M&A deal room management, debt capital markets document distribution, deal participant access management, and deal pipeline tracking within Intralinks's VDR platform.
avoid_when: REGULATION FD FOR PUBLIC COMPANY DEBT OFFERINGS: Automated investor document distribution via Intralinks for public company debt offerings must comply with SEC Regulation FD material non-public information restrictions; automated selective disclosure of material information to some but not all investors creates Regulation FD violation. NDA AND CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT PRE-ACCESS: Automated investor or buyer access provisioning must confirm executed confidentiality agreement before granting Intralinks deal room access; automated access without confirmed NDA creates confidential deal document exposure without legal protection. DEBT OFFERING ACCREDITED INVESTOR VERIFICATION: Automated investor access for private debt offerings via Intralinks must verify accredited investor status under SEC Regulation D; automated access provisioning without accredited investor verification creates illegal private offering distribution to non-accredited investors.

auth.notes: Intralinks uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Founded 1996. Acquired by SS&C Technologies (NASDAQ: SSNC) in 2018. Part of SS&C financial technology platform. VDR and deal management for M&A, debt capital markets, and alternative investments. 99%+ of Fortune 500 have used Intralinks. SOC2, ISO 27001, SSAE 16. Competes with Datasite, Ansarada, and Firmex for VDR and deal management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-deal or subscription pricing for deal management
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-deal workspace pricing based on deal size; enterprise subscription for high-volume investment banks; API access included in enterprise engagement
pricing.notes: New York NY. SS&C Technologies (NASDAQ: SSNC) subsidiary. Founded 1996. Per-deal and enterprise subscription pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; document and deal queries throttled; webhooks for document access and deal events

known_agent_gotchas: SS&C ACQUISITION PLATFORM CONSOLIDATION: Intralinks was acquired by SS&C Technologies in 2018; SS&C platform consolidation with SS&C Algorithmics and other financial products may affect Intralinks API roadmap; evaluate API stability and monitor SS&C developer communications for deprecation and migration notices before building long-term automated workflows

DEBT DEAL DISTRIBUTION LIST ACCREDITED INVESTOR COMPLIANCE: Automated investor access provisioning for private debt offerings via Intralinks must include accredited investor verification step; automated distribution to any investor without verified accredited status creates Regulation D violation; implement investor eligibility verification gate in automated access workflow

DEAL ROOM DOCUMENT EXPIRY AND DOWNLOAD REVOCATION: Intralinks supports document expiry and view-only restrictions; automated document distribution must correctly configure expiry dates and download permissions for time-sensitive deal documents; automated deal room with incorrectly configured document permissions creates post-transaction unauthorized access to deal documents

REGULATION FD SELECTIVE DISCLOSURE TRACKING: Automated deal document distribution to public company investors via Intralinks must track material information distribution to ensure simultaneous disclosure compliance; automated distribution to some investors before others for material deal information creates Regulation FD violation; implement simultaneous distribution or time-controlled release for material deal disclosures

CROSS-BORDER DEAL DATA RESIDENCY CONFIGURATION: Intralinks supports data residency configuration for international deals; automated deal room creation must specify data residency region appropriate for deal jurisdiction; automated creation without explicit data residency selection defaults to US residency which may not comply with EU GDPR or other regional data sovereignty requirements for non-US deals

DEAL CLOSING DOCUMENT ARCHIVAL RETENTION: Automated deal closing via Intralinks must implement deal closing document archival with appropriate retention period; financial transaction records must be retained per SEC and jurisdiction-specific broker-dealer and investment banking record retention requirements (generally 7 years for US deals); automated deal room closure without archival creates regulatory record retention failure
agent_readiness.security_notes: M&A and debt capital markets VDR. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. Global. Confidential deal documents, investor data, and capital markets transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: VDR and deal management. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. Global. Confidential deal documents and capital markets data.
